messages_total.description: Gmail's real wire type is a JSON integer; this bundle's computed_fields camelCase-to-snake_case rename (engine.Interpolate) always stringifies, see docs.md Known limits.

messages_unread.description: Same computed_fields stringification as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.

threads_total.description: Same computed_fields stringification as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.

threads_unread.description: Same computed_fields stringification as messages_total; see docs.md Known limits.
